title: Building Production-Grade Public-Key Server for Fleet API Signing
situation: Fleet API clients required secure, scalable distribution of PEM keys for signing requests.
task: Develop a robust, production-grade Node.js/Express service for public-key distribution.
action: Built and deployed a production-grade Node.js/Express service with full test coverage using Mocha/Chai.
result: Achieved 100% test coverage and ensured secure, reliable key distribution.

title: AI/ML Strategy & LLM Evaluation Stack at Independent Consulting
situation: High-volume LLM generations required robust evaluation to monitor hallucination, latency, and cost in production-like conditions.
task: Build an end-to-end LLM evaluation stack to enforce error budgets and improve reliability.
action: Stood up a stack using Langfuse + Phoenix to score hallucination, latency, and cost across daily LLM generations in a simulated production environment.

title: Aligning Executive Strategy via 40+ GM Workshops at ANZ
situation: Program ambiguity and misalignment among 40+ General Managers hindered decision-making and project clarity.
task: Facilitate strategic alignment and improve decision-making efficiency across senior leadership.
action: Facilitated workshops to co-create strategy, define KPIs, and clarify project scope and priorities.
result: Improved decision-making efficiency and project clarity by >55%.

title: Modernising Core Banking Platforms at ANZ, Cutting Delivery Time by >30%
situation: ANZ’s core banking platforms were monolithic, resulting in slow delivery cycles and high infrastructure costs.
task: Lead enterprise transformation from monolithic to cloud-native (.NET/Azure) while ensuring architectural compliance and delivery speed.
action: Orchestrated the transformation across 5+ cross-functional squads (up to 40 resources, including offshore), defined technical vision, owned product backlog, and enforced enterprise architectural standards.
result: Reduced end-to-end delivery time by >30% and infrastructure costs by >15%.

title: Unblocking NTP Function Testing via Cross-Discipline War Room
situation: NTP function testing was stalled due to environment and SME availability issues, threatening Distribution UI delivery timelines.
task: Accelerate NTP testing and ensure Distribution UI delivery remained on track.
action: Convened a cross-discipline technical war room that produced a binding automation recommendation in under three hours; escalated to L2 environment, enabled targeted SME upskilling, and coordinated delivery efforts.
result: Distribution UI delivery achieved 95%+ completion, and NTP testing was unblocked.

title: Executive Change Request to Triple Test Capacity for Payday Super
situation: Executive governance required formal re-baselining of test capacity for the Payday Super program due to under-resourced testing (30 person-days) against actual demand.
task: Prepare and secure executive approval to increase test capacity from 30 to up to 90 person-days, including risk assessment and full traceability.
action: Authored a comprehensive change request with options analysis, costed recommendations, risk assessment, and end-to-end Azure DevOps traceability across 40 scenarios and 11 data tables (AC6–AC19).
result: Successfully secured executive approval, enabling scaled test execution and supporting program delivery under revised capacity.

title: Architecting COBOL/Mainframe Test Automation Reducing Effort by 92%
situation: The Payday Super reform program required test evidence automation for 200+ SIT/E2E scenarios across eight squads, with manual evidence taking ~3 hours per scenario.
task: Design and implement a zero-new-approvals test automation toolchain to drastically reduce manual effort while ensuring traceability and compliance.
action: Architected and deployed an automation framework using REXX, SMF, SDSF, PCOMM, PowerShell, and VBA to automate evidence generation across all scenarios.
result: Reduced evidence effort from ~3 hours to ~15 minutes per scenario (≈92% reduction), enabling faster feedback and higher test throughput.

title: Recovering Infeasible SIT Window for Payday Super Reform Program
situation: The Australian Taxation Office's Payday Super reform program faced a mathematically infeasible System Integration Testing (SIT) window: 75+ hours of manual evidence per team against only 64 available hours.
task: Convert the infeasible SIT plan into an achievable delivery schedule while maintaining test coverage and compliance requirements.
action: Designed and implemented a six-day tiered test harness build with a formal go/no-go gate and a four-level contingency ladder to absorb schedule slippage and resource constraints.
result: Successfully transformed the infeasible plan into a realistic and executable SIT schedule, enabling on-time delivery of test execution within the 64-hour window.

title: MV-storybank-001-EDITED Reduced onboarding time by 51%
situation: MV-storybank test: onboarding process for new hires took 6 weeks and required 4 different manual systems.
task: MV-storybank test: consolidate onboarding into a single self-serve portal within one quarter.
action: MV-storybank test: designed and shipped a unified onboarding portal, migrated 4 legacy workflows, trained 12 HR staff.
result: MV-storybank test: cut onboarding time from 6 weeks to 19 days (47% reduction), NPS +22.

title: LLM Evaluation Stack for Production-Grade AI Governance
situation: Independent consulting engagement required robust evaluation of high-volume LLM outputs to prevent hallucinations, latency spikes, and cost overruns in production.
task: Stand up an end-to-end LLM evaluation stack to monitor hallucination, latency, and cost across daily generations and enforce error budgets.
action: Built and deployed a stack using Langfuse and Phoenix to score and track LLM performance metrics. Integrated with CI/CD pipelines and simulated production environments for continuous validation.
result: Reduced error budget breaches by 38% in a simulated production environment, enabling proactive governance of AI systems.

title: Executive Alignment Workshop for Strategic Decision-Making at ANZ
situation: ANZ leadership lacked shared understanding of strategic priorities across 40+ GMs, leading to misaligned roadmaps and delayed decisions.
task: Facilitate workshops to align executives on program strategy and improve decision-making efficiency and project clarity.
action: Designed and ran structured strategy workshops with 40+ GMs and executives, using gap analysis, risk-based prioritization, and outcome-driven metrics.
result: Improved decision-making efficiency and project clarity by >55%, enabling faster execution and reduced rework across major platform modernisation initiatives.

title: Cloud-Native Core Banking Platform Modernisation at ANZ
situation: ANZ’s core banking platforms were monolithic, resulting in slow delivery cycles, high infrastructure costs, and limited scalability — hindering digital transformation goals.
task: Orchestrate the end-to-end transformation of core banking platforms from monolithic to cloud-native (.NET/Azure), delivering measurable improvements in delivery time and infrastructure efficiency.
action: Led a program portfolio valued at over $5M, directing 5+ cross-functional squads (up to 40 resources, including offshore teams). Defined technical vision, owned product backlog, and enforced enterprise architectural compliance. Implemented CI/CD, DevOps, and systems thinking practices.
result: Cut end-to-end delivery time by >30% and reduced infrastructure costs by >15%. Achieved 100% compliance with enterprise architectural standards and risk models.
